reasoning: Iterations 1 and 2 both regressed (~30-31 ms vs 29.3 ms baseline) despite targeting low-risk optimizations (zone map filtering, thread count). No forward momentum achieved. Zero iterations remaining; can no longer explore optimizations.
strategy_notes: Q6 maintains correctness (1230113636.01 matches ground truth) and executes in ~30 ms on average. The optimization attempts identified correct bottlenecks (zone map filtering, SIMD vectorization, thread underutilization) but failed to deliver gains, suggesting either: (1) zone map metadata availability/format issues in storage, (2) unintended contention from thread scaling, or (3) implementation challenges with SIMD intrinsics. The 82% gap to GenDB target (14.19-19 ms) and 48% gap to DuckDB (19.2-22.1 ms) remain unresolved. Future optimization requires deeper investigation into zone map storage format and more cautious thread scaling validation.
notes: Iteration budget exhausted. Recommend: (1) Audit zone map file format and metadata loading in gendb storage layer; (2) Validate thread scaling with contention profiling (locks, atomic contention); (3) Consider incremental SIMD adoption with compiler flags (-mavx512f) rather than intrinsics; (4) Profile actual cache behavior before morsel/prefetch tuning.
